case_title: AUTORETURN VS. YURI FIORELA ZUNIGA ROMERO

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION AND AGREEMENT OF PARTIES TO DECEMBER 16, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. D.506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-16-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YURI FIORELA ZUNIGA ROMERO, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER DANIEL NAVARRO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR 60 DAYS TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO CONTACT SFPD REGARDING WAIVING STORAGE FEES ON DEFENDANTS VEHICLE SINCE 2014 AND TO FIND OUT WHY THE VEHICLE WAS HELD FOR SO LONG. PLAINTIFF REPRESENTATIVE, DAN SCANLAN IS ASKED BY THE COURT TO PROVIDE DEFENDANT INFORMATION TO ASSIST HER WITH WORKING WITH SFPD. PLAINTIFF AGREES AND PROVIDES DEFENDANT HIS BUSINESS CARD FOR HER TO CONTACT HIM IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, YURI FIORELA ZUNIGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00- SERVED JUL-08-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, YURI FIORELA ZUNIGA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO APR-21-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE (SEE NOTES)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES TO DECEMBER 16, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. D. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
